channel.title: Machine Learning on The Bridge: A Research Focused Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on The Bridge: A Research Focused Blog

item.title: TDA Augmented Competitive Programming with LLMs
item.description:
Abstract

A concise summary of the post’s content and significance.

Introduction

Despite their apparent capacity for reasoning, current large language models (LLMs) do not engage in ’thinking’ in the conventional cognitive sense. Fundamentally, they are autoregressive probabilistic systems: they generate output by selecting the next token based on statistical correlations with preceding tokens. This mechanism, while capable of producing coherent and contextually rich language, lacks true intentionality, abstract awareness, or internal representation of goals, beliefs, or logical continuity beyond learned statistical patterns.
